text:
Yoshihiro Kagawa
Yoshihiro Kagawa is a Senior Language Lecturer of Japanese at NYU Shanghai. Kagawa holds an MA in Political Science from Doshisha University and Teaching Japanese as a Second Language (TJSL) certification.
Kagawa comes to NYU Shanghai with over fifteen years of experience in teaching Japanese at the university level. Most recently, he was a Language Tutor in Japanese at the University of Nottingham Ningbo. In that role, he also served as the Japanese Language Coordinator since 2017.
Education
MA, Political ScienceDoshisha University
Elementary Japanese I

text_blocks.text: Yoshihiro Kagawa is a Senior Language Lecturer of Japanese at NYU Shanghai. Kagawa holds an MA in Political Science from Doshisha University and Teaching Japanese as a Second Language (TJSL) certification.

Kagawa comes to NYU Shanghai with over fifteen years of experience in teaching Japanese at the university level. Most recently, he was a Language Tutor in Japanese at the University of Nottingham Ningbo. In that role, he also served as the Japanese Language Coordinator since 2017.
